nodes.label: AI as ideation and brainstorming partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I approach using AI as I would if I was in an in-person brainstorming session

nodes.label: Human-authored rough draft as foundation
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated rough draft as starting point
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle all rough drafts of what I'm writing on my own, before engaging AI

nodes.label: AI refinement and finessing of copy
nodes.grounding_span: I'll often just paste the entire long form copy into the model and ask it to finesse or make it better

nodes.label: AI for administrative and redundant tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd also really like to explore more ways to utilize AI for some more administrative/redundant tasks

nodes.label: Creative integrity and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: it's necessary to maintain creative integrity for myself and my clients and keep that real, human component

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human connection
nodes.grounding_span: keeping the human element evident in creative work

nodes.label: Professional skill development and differentiation
nodes.grounding_span: I have to keep my skills sharp and detailed and specific to each client in order to set myself apart

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for poetry rhyme schemes
nodes.grounding_span: I was pretty satisfied with was with poetry writing

nodes.label: Frustration with AI missing the mark on simplicity
nodes.grounding_span: there are times when it really misses the mark and comes up with words and rhymes that are way too advanced for children

nodes.label: Intentional commitment to writing own drafts first
nodes.grounding_span: I always make sure to write my own drafts first

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use for admin tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd also really like to explore more ways to utilize AI for some more administrative/redundant tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through selective adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I then read through what the model comes up with and will revise my own copy based on things I like

nodes.label: Human-first creative process with AI as enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: By starting with original thoughts and using AI to refine and make them better
